summary_direction: Position Paul around BA, application support, requirements, UAT, production readiness, and enterprise systems.
bullets_to_emphasize: Emphasize enterprise systems, requirements, UAT, release readiness, and stakeholder communication.
bullets_to_rewrite_or_add: Review role-specific keywords and adjust summary/top bullets manually.
claims_to_avoid: Do not overstate hands-on Python experience; present as learning/ramp-up unless project evidence is included.
Do not claim direct ownership of tools/platforms not actually used.
cover_letter_angle: Open with BA/application support fit for Senior Product Analyst at MarketAxess.
interview_story_focus: Use a concise enterprise application support / BA story grounded in FRBNY and prior consulting experience.
next_action: Use this tailoring guidance to update the resume for MarketAxess — Senior Product Analyst.
